name: MultiDrawing
summary: The MultiDrawing class is for handling multidrawings.

methods.name: CommitChanges.
methods.summary: Commits the changes made to the drawings database so far. Commit inserts a kind of save-point into the database and the save-point will be retrieved if the user does undo. Commit also executes all messages. Please note that you need to also to save the drawings database to persists the changes to disk.

methods.name: CommitChanges(String)
methods.summary: Commits the changes made to the drawings database so far. Commit inserts a kind of save-point into the database and the save-point will be retrieved if the user does undo. Commit also executes all messages. Please note that you need to also to save the drawings database to persists the changes to disk.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes the drawing. An active drawing cannot be deleted.

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties(Dictionary.String, Double..)
methods.summary: Retrieves all double user properties for the object with the given list of names.

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties(List.String., Dictionary.String, Double..)
methods.summary: Retrieves all double user properties for the object with the given list of names.

methods.name: GetIntegerUserProperties(Dictionary.String, Int32..)
methods.summary: Retrieves all integer user properties for the object with the given list of names.

methods.name: GetIntegerUserProperties(List.String., Dictionary.String, Int32..)
methods.summary: Retrieves all integer user properties for the object with the given list of names.

methods.name: GetPlotFileName
methods.summary: Get plot file name.

methods.name: GetPlotFileNameExt
methods.summary: Get plot file name.

methods.name: GetSheet
methods.summary: Gets the sheet of the drawing.

methods.name: GetStringUserProperties(Dictionary.String, String..)
methods.summary: Retrieves all string user properties for the object with the given list of names.

methods.name: GetStringUserProperties(List.String., Dictionary.String, String..)
methods.summary: Retrieves all string user properties for the object with the given list of names.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Double.)
methods.summary: Gets a double property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Int32.)
methods.summary: Gets an integer property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, String.)
methods.summary: Gets a string property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Not supported.

methods.name: IsSameDatabaseObject
methods.summary: Returns true if the current object and the given object are referencing the same database object.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Applies the changes made to the drawing attributes.

methods.name: PlaceViews
methods.summary: Places views on the sheet. Computes the required size of the views to fit the parts, then places the views so that they fit on the sheet and do not overlap. Adjusts the sheet size if needed.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects the drawing.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Double)
methods.summary: Sets a double property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Int32)
methods.summary: Sets an integer property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, String)
methods.summary: Sets a string property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

properties.name: CommitMessage
properties.summary: Gets the commit message

properties.name: CreationDate
properties.summary: The drawing creation date.

properties.name: DrawingTypeStr
properties.summary: The type of the drawing

properties.name: IsFrozen
properties.summary: Describes whether the drawing is frozen.

properties.name: IsIssued
properties.summary: Describes whether the drawing is issued.

properties.name: IsIssuedButModified
properties.summary: Describes whether the drawing is issued but modified since it was issued.

properties.name: IsLocked
properties.summary: Describes whether the drawing is locked.

properties.name: IsLockedBy
properties.summary: Gets the logged in username that set the drawing to locked

properties.name: IsMasterDrawing
properties.summary: Describes whether the drawing is a master drawing (shown with a special symbol on the drawing list).

properties.name: IsReadyForIssue
properties.summary: Describes whether the drawing is ready for issue.

properties.name: IsReadyForIssueBy
properties.summary: Gets the logged in username that set the drawing Ready for issue

properties.name: IssuingDate
properties.summary: The drawing issuing date.

properties.name: Layout
properties.summary: Gets the drawing layout attributes.

properties.name: Mark
properties.summary: The drawing mark.

properties.name: ModificationDate
properties.summary: The drawing modification date.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: The name of the drawing.

properties.name: OutputDate
properties.summary: The drawing output date. XS_DISABLE_DRAWING_PLOT_DATE controls whether this date is set.

properties.name: QueryReturnValue
properties.summary: Status information about the latest database operation (select, insert, modify, delete).

properties.name: SectionViewStartLabel
properties.summary: Gets the drawing attribute for start label of section view

properties.name: Title1
properties.summary: The first drawing title.

properties.name: Title2
properties.summary: The second drawing title.

properties.name: Title3
properties.summary: The third drawing title.

properties.name: UpToDateStatus
properties.summary: Gets the drawing up to date status.
